rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEANETTE L BOGAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised to correct statutory fees. PC 10810 states fees are 4% of first $100,000, 3% of next $100,000, 2% of next $800,000 and 1% of next $9,000,000, so Counsel is entitled to $4,000, $3,000, $16,000 and 1% of $98,575.76 is $985.76. Total fees due $23,985.76.
